# Auto-generated from triggers.log @ 2026-05-29T02:49:10+00:00. Do not hand-edit. Run POST /reload after the engine regenerates the source.

## active_lens
Scopes: none

Checks if the specified lens is open

## active_lens_option
Scopes: none

Checks if the specified lens option is activated

## add_to_temporary_list
Scopes: none

Saves a temporary target for use during the trigger execution
This is used to build lists in triggers.
If used within an any-trigger, placement within the trigger is quite important. The game will iterate through every instance of the any-trigger until it finds a single instance that fulfills the requirements, and then it will stop.
In order to add every instance of a scope that fulfills certain conditions, use "count = all" while also placing this "effect" at the very end of the any-trigger (so that every condition is evaluated for every iteration).

## additional_war_exhaustion
Scopes: country

Compares the additional war exhaustion the scoped country has accumulated from scripted events in the target diplomatic play

## age
Scopes: character

Compares the character age

## aggressive_diplomatic_plays_permitted
Scopes: country

True if country is independent or permitted to start their own Diplomatic Plays

## ai_ship_value
Scopes: ship

AI valuation of a ship in £, equal to the current template-version construction cost times NAI::SHIP_TRANSFER_BASE_VALUE_PER_CONSTRUCTION_POINT

## all_false
Scopes: none

true if all children are false (equivalent to NOR)

## always
Scopes: none

checks if the assigned yes/no value is true
always = no  # always fails
always = scope:a_boolean_value # evaluated at runtime

## amendment_can_be_repealed
Scopes: amendment

Check if the amendment can be repealed

## amendment_count
Scopes: law

Compares the number of amendments in scope law

## amendment_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has on the specified amendment type, assuming the amendment type has a parent law
	amendment = <scope>
	value = <stance>
}

## and
Scopes: none

all inside trigger must be true

## any_active_law
Scopes: country
Targets: law

Iterate through all active laws in a country

## any_active_party
Scopes: country
Targets: party

Iterate through all active political parties in a country

## any_character
Scopes: none
Targets: character

Iterate through all characters globally

## any_character_in_exile_pool
Scopes: none
Targets: character

Iterate through characters in the exile pool

## any_character_in_void
Scopes: none
Targets: character

Iterate through characters in the void

## any_character_role
Scopes: character
Targets: character_role

Iterate through all roles of the scoped character

## any_civil_war
Scopes: country
Targets: civil_war

Iterate through all civil wars related to the scoped country

## any_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)

## any_cobelligerent_in_war
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all wars

## any_combat_unit
Scopes: battle, building, front, hq, military_formation
Targets: new_combat_unit

Iterate through all combat units of input scope
Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle

## any_company
Scopes: country
Targets: company

Iterate through all companies in a country

## any_country
Scopes: none
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries globally

## any_country_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: country

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_country_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: country

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_country_in_allahabad_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: country

free_cotton_producing_arable_land = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_state = {
		limit = {
			can_construct_building = building_cotton_plantation
		}
		add = this.free_arable_land
	}
}

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000

	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_country_in_amazon
Scopes: none
Targets: country

ship_mod_coastal_defence_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_strategy = ai_strategy_armed_isolationism }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

## any_country_in_americas
Scopes: none
Targets: country

balkan_league_power_projection = {
	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_country_in_anatolia_old
Scopes: none
Targets: country

jail_ten_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 5
		max = 25
	}
}

Scopes: none
Targets: country

ship_mod_jeune_ecole_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_jeune_ecole }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

## any_country_in_angola
Scopes: none
Targets: country

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

	add = 1
	max = 3

## any_country_in_australia
Scopes: none
Targets: country

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

Targets: country

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

## any_country_in_greater_romania
Scopes: none
Targets: country

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

## any_country_in_gujarat_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: country

ship_mod_jeune_ecole_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_jeune_ecole }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

## any_country_in_han_homelands
Scopes: none
Targets: country

state_urbanization_rate = {
    value = total_urbanization
    divide = state_population
    multiply = 1000
    min = 0
    max = 1
}

## any_country_in_himalayas
Scopes: none
Targets: country

convert_gdp_to_army_size = { #average conversion of army_size to army_power_projection. Balance here.
	value = gdp
	min = 1
	divide = 5000
}

## any_country_in_himalayas_old
Scopes: none
Targets: country

average_italian_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_italian.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_italian.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

## any_country_in_historic_byzantium
Scopes: none
Targets: country

jail_five_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 10
		max = 15
	}
}

## any_country_in_home_islands
Scopes: none
Targets: country

raiding_level = { # 1-6
	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

## any_country_in_honshu
Scopes: none
Targets: country

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_country_in_hungary
Scopes: none
Targets: country

money_amount_multiplier_very_small = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 10000
	multiply = 0.075
	round = yes
	multiply = 10
	min = 100
}

## any_country_in_iberia_old
Scopes: none
Targets: country

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

Scopes: none

		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_merchant_navy }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}

	max = 200

Scopes: none
Targets: country

jail_three_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 20
		max = 10
	}
}

## any_country_in_italy_old
Scopes: none
Targets: country

state_infrastructure_balance = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			infrastructure > 0
		}
		value = infrastructure
		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}
}

    add = cu:south_italian.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

## any_country_in_japan_old
Scopes: none
Targets: country

balkan_league_power_projection = {
	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_country_in_krakatoa_tsunami_zone
Scopes: none
Targets: country

free_dye_producing_arable_land = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_state = {
		limit = {
			can_construct_building = building_dye_plantation
		}
		add = this.free_arable_land
	}
}

	value = 0

		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_country_strategic_region
Scopes: country
Targets: strategic_region

Iterate through all strategic regions containing states owned by the scoped country

## any_decentralized_country
Scopes: none
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries that are decentralized

## any_diplomatic_catalyst
Scopes: country
Targets: diplomatic_catalyst

Iterate through all diplomatic catalysts in the recent memory of a country

## any_diplomatic_play
Scopes: none
Targets: diplomatic_play

Iterate through all diplomatic plays globally

## any_diplomatically_relevant_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all diplomatically relevant countries of a country scope

## any_direct_subject
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country directly below current in hierarchy

## any_enemy_in_diplo_play
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)

## any_enemy_in_war
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all wars

## any_false
Scopes: none

true if any child is false (equivalent to NAND)

## any_harvest_condition
Scopes: country, state, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: harvest_condition

Iterate through all harvest conditions affecting a state, state region, strategic region, or country

## any_in_global_list
Scopes: none

Iterate through all items in global list. list = name or variable = name

## any_in_hierarchy
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country in current hierarchy, including current

## any_in_list
Scopes: none

Iterate through all items in list. list = name or variable = name

## any_in_local_list
Scopes: none

Iterate through all items in local list. list = name or variable = name

## any_influenced_interest_group
Scopes: political_movement
Targets: interest_group

Iterate through all interest groups influenced by a political movement

## any_interest_group
Scopes: country
Targets: interest_group

Iterate through all interest groups in a country

## any_law
Scopes: country
Targets: law

Iterate through all laws in a country

## any_lobby_member
Scopes: political_lobby
Targets: interest_group

Iterate through all interest group members of a lobby

## any_market
Scopes: none
Targets: market

Iterate through all markets globally

## any_market_goods
Scopes: market
Targets: market_goods

Iterate through all active (market) goods in a market

## any_member
Scopes: party
Targets: interest_group

Iterate through all interest group members of a party

## any_military_formation
Scopes: country, front, hq
Targets: military_formation

Iterate through all military formations currently present at input scope
Supported scopes: country, front, hq

## any_neighbouring_state
Scopes: country, state, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: state

Iterate through all states neighbouring a state region

## any_overlord_or_above
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country above current in hierarchy

## any_owned_country
Scopes: company
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries owned by the scoped company

## any_participant
Scopes: diplomatic_pact
Targets: country

Any of two participants of the diplomatic pact in a scope

## any_political_lobby
Scopes: country, interest_group
Targets: political_lobby

Iterate through all political lobbies in a country or interest group

## any_political_movement
Scopes: country
Targets: political_movement

Iterate through all political movements in a country

## any_possible_amendment_type
Scopes: law
Targets: amendment_type

Iterate through amendment types that could be added to the scoped law

## any_potential_party
Scopes: country
Targets: party

Iterate through all potential political parties in a country

## any_power_bloc
Scopes: none
Targets: power_bloc

Iterate through all power blocs

## any_power_bloc_member
Scopes: power_bloc
Targets: country

Iterate through all members of the scoped power bloc including the leader

## any_preferred_law
Scopes: interest_group
Targets: law

Iterate through all active and possible laws in an interest group's country, ordered by how much they prefer that law

## any_primary_culture
Scopes: country, country_definition
Targets: culture

Primary cultures of the scoped country or country definition

## any_province
Scopes: province
Targets: state

Iterate through all Provinces in the scoped State

## any_province_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: province

average_italian_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_italian.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_italian.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

## any_province_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: province

country_slave_culture_population = {
	value = "culture_percent_country(scope:culture)"
	multiply = total_population
}

## any_province_in_allahabad_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: province

jail_three_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 20
		max = 10
	}
}

## any_province_in_alpide_belt
Scopes: none
Targets: province

lowest_state_population = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_province_in_amazon
Scopes: none
Targets: province

building_groups_extra = {
	add = building_group_levels_to_increase_value
	subtract = building_group_levels_existing
}

## any_province_in_americas
Scopes: none
Targets: province

max_sakoku_trade_center_level = {
 	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add
	subtract = scope:num_levels
}

## any_province_in_anatolia_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

average_german_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_german.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_german.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

## any_province_in_andean_federation
Scopes: none
Targets: province

money_amount_multiplier_very_small = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 10000
	multiply = 0.075
	round = yes
	multiply = 10
	min = 100
}

Scopes: none
Targets: province

privy_purse_multiplier_base = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	min = 100
}

Targets: province

gfx_capitalship_deploy_count = {
	value = 0
	scope:military_formation = { add = num_units }
	divide = 50
	add = 1
	max = 10
}

	divide = 50
	add = 1
	max = 10
}

## any_province_in_arabic_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

state_infrastructure_balance = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			infrastructure > 0
		}
		value = infrastructure
		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}
}

## any_province_in_baltic_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_province_in_baltic_states_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

}

## any_province_in_himalayas_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

money_amount_multiplier_medium = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.25
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	min = 100
}

## any_province_in_historic_byzantium
Scopes: none
Targets: province

raiding_level = { # 1-6
	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

## any_province_in_home_islands
Scopes: none
Targets: province

ship_mod_merchant_navy_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_merchant_navy }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

	multiply = 100
	min = 100
}

Targets: province

max_sakoku_trade_center_level = {
 	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add
	subtract = scope:num_levels
}

	min = 100

	subtract = this.law_estimated_stall_chance
}

## any_province_in_zanj_old
Scopes: none
Targets: province

max_sakoku_trade_center_level = {
 	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add
	subtract = scope:num_levels
}

## any_rival_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope

## any_rivaling_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope

## any_scope_admiral
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation

## any_scope_ally
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all allies to a: country

## any_scope_amendment
Scopes: law
Targets: amendment

Iterate through amendments of the scoped law

## any_scope_army
Scopes: country, front, hq
Targets: military_formation

Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope
Supported scopes: country, front, hq

## any_scope_article
Scopes: treaty
Targets: treaty_article

Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty

## any_scope_article_option
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty
Targets: treaty_article_options

Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options

## any_scope_building
Scopes: country, state
Targets: building

Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country

## any_scope_character
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front

## any_scope_country
Scopes: market, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)

## any_scope_culture
Scopes: country, state
Targets: culture

Iterate through all cultures in the scope

## any_scope_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country
Targets: diplomatic_pact

Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope

## any_scope_fleet
Scopes: country, hq
Targets: military_formation

Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope
Supported scopes: country, hq

## any_scope_front
Scopes: war
Targets: front

Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War

## any_scope_general
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation

## any_scope_held_interest_marker
Scopes: country
Targets: interest_marker

Iterate through all interest markers held by a country

## any_scope_homeland_state
Scopes: country, culture
Targets: state

Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country

## any_scope_initiator_ally
Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play

## any_scope_interest_marker
Scopes: country, state_region, strategic_region
Targets: interest_marker

Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region

## any_scope_je_involved
Scopes: journal_entry
Targets: country

Iterate through all involved in a journal entry

## any_scope_play_involved
Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play

## any_scope_politician
Scopes: country, front, interest_group, military_formation
Targets: character

Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup

## any_scope_pop
Scopes: country, culture, interest_group, state
Targets: pop

Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture

## any_scope_regional_hqs
Scopes: company
Targets: building

Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company

## any_scope_ship
Scopes: country, military_formation
Targets: ship

Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation

## any_scope_state
Scopes: country, front, state_region, strait, strategic_region, theater
Targets: state

Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait

## any_scope_strait
Scopes: country, state
Targets: strait

Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country

## any_scope_target_ally
Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play

## any_scope_theater
Scopes: country
Targets: theater

Iterate through all theaters in a: country

## any_scope_treaty
Scopes: country
Targets: treaty

Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country

## any_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated

## any_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars
Scopes: country
Targets: war

Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country

## any_scope_war
Scopes: country
Targets: war

Iterate through all wars related to the scope

## any_sea_node_adjacent_state
Scopes: state
Targets: state

Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state

## any_state
Scopes: none
Targets: state

Iterate through all states globally

## any_state_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: state

money_amount_multiplier_small = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.15
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	min = 100
}

## any_state_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: state

gfx_supportship_deploy_count = {
	value = 0
	scope:military_formation = { add = num_units }
	divide = 50
	add = 1
	max = 10
}

## any_state_in_allahabad_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: state

ship_mod_merchant_navy_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_merchant_navy }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

Scopes: none

	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	min = 100
}

	subtract = building_levels_existing

Targets: state

	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add
	subtract = scope:num_levels
}

## any_state_in_arctic_russia_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state

law_estimated_pass_chance = { # needs law_type scope
	add = this.law_estimated_enactment_chance
	subtract = this.law_estimated_stall_chance
}

## any_state_in_asia
Scopes: none
Targets: state

ottoman_power_projection = {
	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = ottoman_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

max_canton_system_level = {
	value = state.modifier:state_trade_center_max_limit_add
	subtract = scope:num_levels
}

		add = army_power_projection
	}

## any_state_in_north_africa_egypt
Scopes: none
Targets: state

jail_three_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 20
		max = 10
	}
}

## any_state_in_north_africa_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state

average_german_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_german.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_german.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

	every_province = {

			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

## any_state_in_subsaharan_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: state

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_state_region
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

Iterate through all state regions

## any_state_region_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

law_estimated_pass_chance = { # needs law_type scope
	add = this.law_estimated_enactment_chance
	subtract = this.law_estimated_stall_chance
}

## any_state_region_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

ship_mod_coastal_defence_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_strategy = ai_strategy_armed_isolationism }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_allahabad_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

law_estimated_pass_chance = { # needs law_type scope
	add = this.law_estimated_enactment_chance
	subtract = this.law_estimated_stall_chance
}

## any_state_region_in_alpide_belt
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

ship_mod_merchant_navy_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_merchant_navy }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_amazon
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

state_infrastructure_balance = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			infrastructure > 0
		}
		value = infrastructure
		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_americas
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

jail_ten_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 5
		max = 25
	}
}

Targets: state_region

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

			add = market_goods_sell_orders
		}
	}
	divide = 1000
	add = 1
	max = 3
}

	min = 100

## any_state_region_in_belarus_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

raiding_level = { # 1-6
	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

## any_state_region_in_burma
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

raiding_level = { # 1-6
	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

## any_state_region_in_canada
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

jail_five_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 10
		max = 15
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_canada_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_caribbean_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

privy_purse_value = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_castile
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

balkan_league_power_projection = {
	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_caucasus_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

balkan_league_conscript_multiplier = {
	value = root.cached_ai_incorporated_population
	divide = 50000
	round = yes
	min = 10
	max = 200
}

## any_state_region_in_central_america
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_central_america_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_very_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 2.5
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_central_asia
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_very_small = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 10000
	multiply = 0.075
	round = yes
	multiply = 10
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_central_asia_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

law_estimated_pass_chance = { # needs law_type scope
	add = this.law_estimated_enactment_chance
	subtract = this.law_estimated_stall_chance
}

## any_state_region_in_central_europe
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_more_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 1
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_central_india_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

state_infrastructure_balance = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			infrastructure > 0
		}
		value = infrastructure
		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_china
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

jail_ten_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 5
		max = 25
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_chorasmia
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

convert_gdp_to_army_size = { #average conversion of army_size to army_power_projection. Balance here.
	value = gdp
	min = 1
	divide = 5000
}

## any_state_region_in_colonial_la_plata
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

lowest_state_population = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_colonial_new_grenada
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 0.5
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

## any_state_region_in_colonial_new_spain
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_colonial_peru
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

balkan_league_conscript_multiplier = {
	value = root.cached_ai_incorporated_population
	divide = 50000
	round = yes
	min = 10
	max = 200
}

	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}

## any_state_region_in_dixie_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

ship_mod_jeune_ecole_doctrine = {
	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_jeune_ecole }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}

	min = 1

	max = 6

## any_state_region_in_east_sibera_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

average_italian_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_italian.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_italian.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

## any_state_region_in_new_zealand
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

jail_three_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 20
		max = 10
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_niger_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

gfx_artillery_mobilization_count = {
	value = 0
	market = {
		mg:artillery = {
			add = market_goods_sell_orders
		}
	}
	divide = 1000
	add = 1
	max = 3
}

## any_state_region_in_nile_basin
Scopes: none

	value = 1

		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_merchant_navy }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

	value = 0

		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_state_region_in_north_africa_egypt
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

gfx_infantry_mobilization_count = {
	value = 0
	market = {
		mg:small_arms = {
			add = market_goods_sell_orders
		}
	}
	divide = 1000
	add = 1
	max = 3
}

## any_state_region_in_north_africa_old
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

money_amount_multiplier_very_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 2.5
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			infrastructure > 0
		}
		value = infrastructure
		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}
}

	value = gdp
	min = 1
	divide = 5000
}

## any_state_region_in_subsaharan_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: state_region

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_strategic_objective
Scopes: country
Targets: state

Iterate through all Strategic Objective states from the scoped Country

## any_strategic_region
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

Iterate through all strategic regions globally

## any_strategic_region_in_afghanistan
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

money_amount_multiplier_very_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 2.5
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

## any_strategic_region_in_africa
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

money_amount_multiplier_large = {
	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 0.5
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

## any_strategic_region_in_allahabad_bombay_line
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

annex_subject_base_liberty_desire_change = {
	scope:target_country ?= {
		add = prestige
	}
	round = yes
	min = 1
	max = annex_subject_max_liberty_desire_change
}

## any_strategic_region_in_caucasus_old
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

provinces_with_hazardous_terrain = {
	every_province = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_label = label_hazardous }
			add = 1
		}
	}
}

## any_strategic_region_in_central_america
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

lowest_state_population = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_strategic_region_in_central_america_old
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

free_dye_producing_arable_land = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_state = {
		limit = {
			can_construct_building = building_dye_plantation
		}
		add = this.free_arable_land
	}
}

	value = root.gdp
	divide = 100000
	multiply = 0.05
	round = yes
	multiply = 100
	multiply = root.var:indian_states_annexed
	min = 100
}

	if = {
		limit = {

		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

	}
	round = yes
	min = 1
	max = annex_subject_max_liberty_desire_change
}

		subtract = infrastructure_usage
	}

Targets: strategic_region

lowest_state_population = {
	value = 0
	if = {
		limit = {
			state_population >= 0
		}
		value = state_population
		multiply = -1
	}
}

## any_strategic_region_in_north_india
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

jail_ten_year_value = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = scope:prisoner_scope
		}
		value = scope:prisoner_scope.popularity
		divide = 5
		max = 25
	}
}

## any_strategic_region_in_north_sea_old
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

raiding_level = { # 1-6
	value = raiding_income
	min = 1
	add = 501 #stops divide by 0 errors, round up
	divide = 1000
	min = 1
	round = yes
	max = 6
}

## any_strategic_region_in_northeast_asia
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

average_italian_fervor = {
    value = 0
    add = cu:north_italian.culture_current_fervor
    add = cu:south_italian.culture_current_fervor
    divide = 2
}

	value = root.gdp
	divide = 1000000
	multiply = 1
	round = yes
	multiply = 1000
	min = 100
}

Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

army_projection_comparison = {
	add = overlord.army_power_projection
	if = {
		limit = {
			army_power_projection > 0
		}
		divide = army_power_projection
	}
}

	min = 100
}

	value = 1
	if = {
		limit = { has_law = law_type:law_jeune_ecole }
		multiply = ship_mod_doctrine_boost
	}
}

	every_in_global_list = {
		variable = balkan_league_side_list
		add = army_power_projection
	}
}

## any_strategic_region_in_southern_africa_old
Scopes: none
Targets: strategic_region

free_opium_producing_arable_land = {
	value = 0
	every_scope_state = {
		limit = {
			can_construct_building = building_opium_plantation
		}
		add = this.free_arable_land
	}
}

    max = 1
}

## any_subject_of_subject
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy

## any_subject_or_below
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Any country below current in hierarchy

## any_supporting_character
Scopes: political_movement
Targets: character

Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement

## any_treaty
Scopes: none
Targets: treaty

Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)

## any_valid_mass_migration_culture
Scopes: country
Targets: culture

Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration

## any_war_participant
Scopes: war
Targets: country

Iterate through all participants in a war

## appeasement
Scopes: political_lobby

Compares the appeasement of a political lobby.

## approaching_bureaucracy_shortage
Scopes: country

Check if Institutions in the country will incur a Bureaucracy shortage eventually

## arable_land
Scopes: state

Check arable land in state

## arable_land_country
Scopes: country

Compare arable land in *all* states

## armor
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's armor

## army_mobilization_option_fraction
Scopes: country

Checks that a countries army has a certain percentage of units with a specific monbilization option
scope:country = {
  army_mobilization_option_fraction = {
    target = mobilization_option:key
    value >= 0.2
  }
}

## army_power_projection
Scopes: country

Compare to a country's total army power projection
 scope:example_country = { army_power_projection < root.army_power_projection

## assert_if
Scopes: none

Conditionally cause an assert during run time

## assert_read
Scopes: none

Conditionally cause an assert during read time

## authority
Scopes: country

Compares the available authority of the scoped country

## authority_usage
Scopes: country

Compares the consumed authority of the scoped country

## available_jobs
Scopes: state

Checks the state's number of available jobs in non-subsistence buildings

## average_country_infrastructure
Scopes: country

Check average infrastructure in all states owned by scope country

## average_incorporated_country_infrastructure
Scopes: country

Check average infrastructure in incorporated states owned by the scope country

## average_sol_for_culture
Scopes: country

Compares the average standard of living for the target culture in the country

## average_sol_for_primary_cultures
Scopes: country

Compare average standard of living for primary cultures

## average_sol_for_religion
Scopes: country

Compares the average standard of living for the target religion in the country

## average_sol_for_slaves
Scopes: country

Compare average standard of living for enslaved pops

## binds
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped treaty or treaty_options binds the given country
scope:some_treaty = {
	if = { limit = {
		binds = c:FRA
		binds = c:BEL
	}}
}

## blockade_level
Scopes: state

Compare to state's blockade level

## building_has_goods_shortage
Scopes: building

Check if building has a shortage of any of its inputs

## bureaucracy
Scopes: country

Compares the available bureaucracy of the scoped country

## bureaucracy_usage
Scopes: country

Compares the consumed bureaucracy of the scoped country

## calc_true_if
Scopes: none

Returns true if the specified number of sub-triggers return true

## can_activate_production_method
Scopes: state

Checks if the building of a particular type in scoped state is able to active the specified production method

## can_afford_diplomatic_action
Scopes: country

Checks if the country in scope can afford the Influence for the specified diplomatic action (pact or ongoing)
Where X = country and Y = diplomatic action type

## can_agitate
Scopes: character
Targets: country

Check if the scope character can agitate the target country

## can_be_enacted
Scopes: law

Checks if a law could be enacted by its country, considering its current situation

## can_break_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country

Checks if there is a diplomatic pact of the specified type with target country that can be broken by scope country

## can_construct_building
Scopes: state

Checks if 1 level of <building_type> can be constructed in a scoped state

## can_create_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country

Checks if a diplomatic pact is valid to create with another country

## can_create_treaty
Scopes: none

Checks if a treaty between countries can be created
	first_country = <country>			# (default: none) must _not_ be specified if the created treaty is an amendment
	second_country = <country>			# (default: none) must _not_ be specified if the created treaty is an amendment
	amends = <treaty>					# (default: none) if specified, the created treaty will be an amendment to the specified treaty

	is_draft = yes | no					# (default: yes) must be yes if this treaty is an amendement to an existing treaty
	entered_into_force_on = <date>		# (default: none) means "today" if not specified (for non-drafts). Must _not_ be specified for drafts. Cannot be in the future
	binding_period = {					# (default: 0) must be a nonnegative number, fractional parts will be ignored (truncation)
		days = <nonnegative number>
		| weeks = <nonnegative number>
		| months = <nonnegative number>
		| years = <nonnegative number>
	}

	articles_to_create = {				# (default: empty) non-amendments must have at least one article to create
		{
			article = <key>				# (default: empty) the type of article (determined by script)
			source_country = <country>	# (default: none) directed articles _must_ specify this value, mutual articles _must not_ specify this value
			target_country = <country>	# (default: none) directed articles _must_ specify this value, mutual articles _must not_ specify this value

			inputs = {					# (default: empty) list of inputs values as required by the article
				{
					quantity = <positive number>
					| good = <good>
					| state = <state>
					| strategic_region = <strategic region>
					| company = <company> # TODO: or company type?
					| building = <building> # TODO: or building type?
					| law = <law> # TODO: or law type?
					| country = <country>
				}

				{ ... }					# one input per required input of the corresponding article type
			}
		}

		# some examples of valid articles
		{ article = alliance }			# mutual, no inputs
		{
			article = resource_transfer # directed
			source_country = c:FRA		# because directed
			target_country = c:GBR 		# because directed

			inputs = {
				{ quantity = 250 }		# because resource_transfer has required_inputs = { quantity good }
				{ good = g:coal }		# because resource_transfer has required_inputs = { quantity good }
			}
		}
	}
}

## can_decrease_autonomy
Scopes: country

Check if a subject country is able to become a less autonomous subject type
can_increase_autonomy = yes

## can_establish_company
Scopes: country

Check if the country can establish a new company

## can_form_nation
Scopes: country

Check if the target country is able to potentially form a nation

## can_have_as_subject
Scopes: country

Checks if a country can have another country as a particular type of subject
Where X = country and Y = subject type

## can_have_subjects
Scopes: country

Check if the country is able to have subjects of it sown

## can_increase_autonomy
Scopes: country

Check if a subject country is able to become a more autonomous subject type

## can_invite_any_country
Scopes: power_bloc

Checks whether is possible to invite any country to the scoped Power Bloc.

## can_leave_power_bloc
Scopes: country

Checks if the country in scope can leave its current Power Bloc (returns false if country is not in a Power Bloc)

## can_lobbies_target
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if target country is a valid target for lobbies in the scoped country

## can_own_autonomy_be_decreased
Scopes: country

Check if scoped country can have it's autonomy decreased

## can_potentially_produce_prestige_goods
Scopes: company

Checks if scope company can potentially produce target prestige good type
can_potentially_produce_prestige_good = pg:prestige_good_generic_clothes

## can_queue_building_levels
Scopes: building

Checks if the building's owner could queue the provided number of additional levels without hitting a level or resource potential cap

## can_research
Scopes: country

True if a country can research an technology

## can_send_diplomatic_action
Scopes: country

Checks if a diplomatic action is valid to send by scope country to target country

## can_start_tutorial_lesson
Scopes: none

Can the specified tutorial lesson be started?

## can_take_on_scaled_debt
Scopes: country

Checks if scoped country can take on a certain amount of scaled debt from another country
Where X = country and Y = decimal value

## can_transfer_subject
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Check if the target country can be transferred as a subject to the scoped country
scope:country = {
	can_transfer_subject = c:FRA
}

## can_trigger_event
Scopes: country

Check if country can trigger the specified event

## cash_reserves_available
Scopes: building

Evaluates a production building's available cash reserves

## cash_reserves_ratio
Scopes: building

Evaluates a production building's available cash reserve ratio compared to its maximum
Returns 1 if the building has no maximum cash reserves

## character_acceptance
Scopes: character

Compares the acceptance of the scoped character in the target country against an acceptence value
target = c:FRA
value > 50
}

## character_supports_political_movement
Scopes: character

Checks whether the scoped character supports a political movement

## check_area
Scopes: country, market, province, state, state_region, strategic_region, theater

Compares areas of object to another object

## civil_war_progress
Scopes: civil_war

Compare progress of civil war

## commander_is_available
Scopes: character

Check if a commander is not busy

## commander_rank
Scopes: character

Compares the commanders rank

## company_employed_levels
Scopes: company

Check the number of employed building levels of the scoped company

## company_global_productivity_comparison
Scopes: company

Check the average global productivity of buildings matching this company's buildings, scaled by owned levels for each type

## company_has_building_type_monopoly
Scopes: company
Targets: building_type

Check if the scoped company has a monopoly of the specified building type

## company_has_monopoly
Scopes: company

Check if the scoped company has any monopoly
 company_has_monopoly = yes

## company_is_prosperous
Scopes: company

Check if a company is considered to be prosperous

## company_owned_levels
Scopes: company

Check the number of owned building levels of the scoped company

## company_productivity
Scopes: company

Check the productivity of the scoped company

## company_prosperity
Scopes: company

Check the prosperity of a company

## construction_queue_duration
Scopes: country

Compares the maximum of all the very roughly approximated weeks remaining to finish the constructions in any queue: construction_queue_duration < 52

## construction_queue_government_duration
Scopes: country

Compares the very roughly approximated weeks remaining to finish the constructions in the government queue: construction_queue_government_duration < 52

## construction_queue_num_queued_government_levels
Scopes: country

Compares the number of government constructed building levels in the construction queue

## construction_queue_num_queued_levels
Scopes: country

Compares the number of building levels in the construction queue

## construction_queue_num_queued_private_levels
Scopes: country

Compares the number of privately constructed building levels in the construction queue

## construction_queue_private_duration
Scopes: country

Compares the very roughly approximated weeks remaining to finish the constructions in the private queue: construction_queue_private_duration < 52

## contains_capital_of
Scopes: state_region

Checks if scoped state region contains the capital of target tag

## controls_treaty_port_province
Scopes: state

Checks if the scoped state controls the treaty port province in the state region

## could_support_political_movement
Scopes: character

Check if a character could potentially support a political movement

## country_army_unit_type_fraction
Scopes: country

Checks that a country has a certain percentage of a specific army unit type
scope:example_formation = {
  country_military_unit_type_fraction = {
    target = unit_type:key
    value >= 0.2
  }
}

## country_average_cultural_acceptance
Scopes: country

Compares the average acceptance of a culture that is present in a country against a value
target = cu:french
value >= 50
}

## country_average_culture_and_religion_pop_acceptance
Scopes: country

Average acceptance of country pops of a specific culture and religion.

## country_average_culture_pop_acceptance
Scopes: country

Average acceptance of country pops of a specific culture.

## country_average_religion_pop_acceptance
Scopes: country

Average acceptance of country pops of a specific religion.

## country_average_religious_acceptance
Scopes: country

Compares the average acceptance of a religion that is present in a country against a value
target = rel:catholic
value >= 50
}

## country_can_have_mass_migration_to
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped country can have mass migration to target country
can_have_mass_migration_to = c:country

## country_definition_has_culture
Scopes: country_definition
Targets: culture

Checks if a culture is one of the cultures of the country definition

## country_fervor_primary_culture
Scopes: country

Compares with the hightest fervor of a country's primary cultures

## country_has_building_group_levels
Scopes: country

Checks the sum of building levels for a building group in a country
 country_has_building_group_levels = {
 type = bg_heavy_industry
 value >= 100 }

## country_has_building_levels
Scopes: country

Checks the sum of building levels for a country

## country_has_building_type_levels
Scopes: country

Checks the sum of building levels for a building type in a country
 country_has_building_type_levels = {
 target = bt:building_barracks
 value  >= 100

## country_has_building_type_monopoly
Scopes: country
Targets: building_type

Check if the scoped country has a monopoly of the specified building type

## country_has_country_monopoly
Scopes: country

Check if the scoped country has any country monopolies

## country_has_local_shortage
Scopes: market_goods
Targets: country

Whether the scoped market goods are in shortage in the target country

## country_has_primary_culture
Scopes: country
Targets: culture

Checks if a culture is one of the primary cultures in the country

## country_has_state_religion
Scopes: country
Targets: religion

Checks if a religion is the state religion in the country
country_has_accepted_religion = <religion>

## country_innovation
Scopes: country

Checks the amount of weekly innovation a country produces

## country_or_subject_owns_entire_state_region
Scopes: country

Checks whether the scoped country or any of its subjects owns the entire specified state region

## country_ownership_fraction
Scopes: building

Compares the fraction of this building's levels that are owned by a country
 country_ownership_fraction > 0.5

## country_rank
Scopes: country

Compares a Country's Power Ranking

## country_ship_type_fraction
Scopes: country

Checks that a country has a certain fraction of a specific ship type
	target = ship_type:key
	value >= 0.2
}

## country_tier
Scopes: country

Compare tier of country tag

## country_turmoil
Scopes: country

Compares the country's population weighted turmoil

## crew
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's current crew

## crew_percent
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's current crew

## cultural_acceptance_base
Scopes: country

Compares the acceptance from shared cultural traits of a culture in the scoped country against an acceptence value
target = cu:french
value > 50
}

## cultural_acceptance_delta
Scopes: state

Compare the current local delta (modification) to a culture's acceptance in the scoped state

## culture_can_have_mass_migration_to_country
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped culture can have mass migration to target country
can_have_mass_migration_to_country = c:country

## culture_current_fervor
Scopes: culture

Compares the current fervor for a given culture, culture_current_fervor > 0.2

## culture_has_community_in_state
Scopes: culture

Checks if the scoped culture has a cultural community in a state.

## culture_has_national_awakening
Scopes: culture

Checks if the scoped culture has an active national awakening

## culture_national_awakening_occurred
Scopes: culture

Checks if the scoped culture has ever had a national awakening started

## culture_percent_country
Scopes: country

Checks that a country's population has a certain percentage of a specific culture
scope:example_country = {
  culture_percent_country = {
    target = cu:dixie
    value >= 0.2
  }
}

## culture_percent_state
Scopes: state

Checks that a state's population has a certain percentage of a specific culture
scope:example_state = {
  culture_percent_state = {
    target = cu:dixie
    value >= 0.2
  }
}

## culture_secession_progress
Scopes: culture

Checks the culture's progress percentage towards secession in a country. 0 if no secession movement is active for the culture.

## culture_target_fervor
Scopes: culture

Compares the target fervor for a given culture, culture_target_fervor > 0.2

## current_cohesion_number
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the current Cohesion as a numeric value

## current_cohesion_percentage
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the current Cohesion as a percentage of the maximum of a Power Bloc in scope

## current_law_enactment_score
Scopes: country

Check what the scoped country's AI enactment score is for the currently enacting law

## current_manpower
Scopes: battle_side

Compares the current manpower of a battle side
manpower > 10000

## current_tooltip_depth
Scopes: none

Returns the number of tooltips currently open on screen

## custom_description
Scopes: none

Wraps triggers that get a custom description instead of the auto-generated one
	text = <trigger_localization_key>
	subject = <optional subject scope> #defaults to current scope
	object = <optional object scope>
	value = <optional script value>
	... triggers ...
}

## custom_tooltip
Scopes: none

Replaces the tooltips for the enclosed triggers with a custom text
	text = <text>
	subject = <scope> (optional)
	<trigger>
}

## day_value
Scopes: none

Day value

## daynight_value
Scopes: none

DayNight value

## days_obsolete
Scopes: ship

Compare the number of days since a ship was first marked obsolete by the AI. Returns 0 if the ship has never been marked.

## debug_log
Scopes: none

Log whether the parent trigger succeeded or failed

## debug_log_details
Scopes: none

Log whether the parent trigger succeeded or failed. Log which children succeeded or failed

## dependents
Scopes: pop

Compares the dependents size of the scoped pop

## devastation
Scopes: state

Compares the devastation of a given state

## discriminates_religion
Scopes: country

Checks if the scoped country discriminates the given religion (key)

## earnings
Scopes: building

Compare a building's current annual earnings per employee

## economic_dependence
Scopes: country

Compares the degree of dependence the country in scope has to the target country. Note: This is an expensive trigger

## election_momentum
Scopes: party

Compare election momentum of the scoped party against a value

## electoral_confidence
Scopes: country

Compares the electoral confidence of scope country

## empty_agitator_slots
Scopes: country

Checks number of empty agitator slots in a country

## enacting_any_law
Scopes: country

Checks if you're enacting any law.

## enactment_chance
Scopes: country

Compares the current enactment success chance in scope country (including values from enactment modifier)

## enactment_chance_for_law
Scopes: country

Compares the enactment success chance in scope country for given law (including values from enactment modifier)

## enactment_chance_for_law_without_enactment_modifier
Scopes: country

Compares the enactment success chance in scope country for given law but excludes values from enactment modifier

## enactment_chance_without_enactment_modifier
Scopes: country

Compares the current enactment success chance in scope country but excludes values from enactment modifier

## enactment_phase
Scopes: country

Compares the current law enactment phase in scope country.

## enactment_setback_count
Scopes: country

Compares the current enactment setback count in scope country.

## enemy_contested_wargoals
Scopes: country

Determines the fraction of war goals that enemies in the war are currently contesting

## enemy_occupation
Scopes: country

Determines the (weighted) enemy occupation score of a country

## escalation
Scopes: diplomatic_play

Checks whether escalation has passed a certain threshold

## exists
Scopes: none

Checks whether the specified scope target exists (check for not being the null object)

Scopes: country

Checks if the institution is expanding

Scopes: character

Compares the character experience level

Checks if a pop has a certain amount of food security

  country_military_unit_type_fraction = {
    target = unit_type:key
    value >= 0.2
  }
}

 fraction_of_levels_owned_by_country = {
 target = c:GBR

power_bloc =
{
		free_principle_slots >= 2
}

current_game_date = 1837.1.1

## global_variable_list_size
Scopes: none

Checks the size of a variable list
variable_list_size = { name = X target >= Y }
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is a script value or number

## gold_reserves
Scopes: country

Does the country have the required gold reserves

## gold_reserves_limit
Scopes: country

Compares the country's gold reserves limit
gold_reserves > gold_reserves_limit

## goods_production_rank
Scopes: country

"goods_production_rank(g:luxury_clothes)" < 10

	owner = root
	has_claim_by = c:MEX
}

## has_diplomatic_pact
Scopes: country

Checks if two countries have an active diplomatic pact of type
Where X = country and Y = diplomatic action type, is_initiator is optional parameter that checks to see if scope country is the original initiator/target of the pact

has_trait = trait

Scopes: culture, religion

Checks if scoped culture or religion has the given discrimination trait group

## has_dlc_feature
Scopes: none

Does the host have DLC that enables this particular feature

## has_employee_slots_filled
Scopes: building

Checks whether the amount of employees of a certain poptype are above or below a given percentage of the total amount the building can currently hire. I.e. if a building is at 80% (given as 0.8) of its current hiring capacity for Shopkeepers, for example.
Where X is a pop type and Y is a fixed point

## has_failed_hires
Scopes: building

Checks if a building failed to hire someone last week

Scopes: country, state

Check if state or country has famine

Check if the country has a free (of radicals) government reform

Scopes: none

Supported scopes: Country, Character, State, Building, InterestGroup, PoliticalMovement, Institution, Front

Scopes: none

True if the end date (NDefines::NGame::END_DATE) has been reached

## has_region_stance
Scopes: country

Checks if the scoped country's AI has the specified stance for a strategic region
Usage:
region_stance = {
	region = sr:some_region
	stance = <conquer_region>
}

## has_strategic_land_adjacency
Scopes: country

Checks if country in scope has a strategic adjacency (direct land border or war goal adjacency only) to target state/country
has_strategic_adjacency = <scope>

## has_strategic_region_interest_tier
Scopes: country

Checks the scoped country's interest tier rank in a specific strategic region
scope:country = {
  has_strategic_region_interest_tier = {
    strategic_region = sr:target_region
    value >= 3
  }
}

Checks if country in scope has a particular AI strategy

## has_truce_with

Targets: country

## has_type
Scopes: treaty_article, treaty_article_options

Checks if the scoped object has the type identified by the given string
scope:some_object = {
	has_type = defensive_pact
}

Scopes: none

has_country_unification_candidate = GER

## has_variable
Scopes: none

Checks whether the current scope has the specified variable set

## has_variable_list
Scopes: none

Checks whether the current scope has the specified variable list set

## has_war_exhaustion
Scopes: war

Checks the war exhaustion of the target country in the scoped war

## has_war_goal
Scopes: war

Checks if war has a certain war goal type

## has_war_support
Scopes: war

Checks the war support of the target country in the scoped war

## has_war_with
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is at war with event target

## has_wasted_construction
Scopes: country

Check if country is wasting any of its produced construction.

## hidden_trigger
Scopes: none

Enclosed triggers are not shown in tooltips

## highest_overlapping_interest_tier
Scopes: country

Compares the highest interest tier rank (scope country) among strategic regions where both countries have an interest.
Usage:
country_scope = {
	highest_overlapping_interest_tier = { target = c:GBR value >= 2 }
}
Returns -1 if there are no overlapping interests.

## highest_secession_progress
Scopes: country

Compares the highest secession progress of any secession movement in a given country

## hit_points
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's current hit points

## hit_points_percent
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's current hit points

## ig_approval
Scopes: interest_group

Compare to scoped interest group approval
Usages: ig_approval > 2, ig_approval < happy

## ig_clout
Scopes: interest_group

Compare to scoped interest group's clout

## ig_government_power_share
Scopes: interest_group

Compare to scoped interest group's political strength divided by total government political strength

## ig_state_pol_strength_share
Scopes: state

True if IG in scope has scripted political strength in state
	target = scope:target_ig
	value = 0.3
}

## import_advantage
Scopes: state_goods

Compare to state goods import advantage

## import_tariff_level
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state goods has a particular import tariff level set

## in_default
Scopes: country

Check if the country is currently in default

## in_election_campaign
Scopes: country

Check if the country is in election campaign period

## income_transfer
Scopes: diplomatic_pact

Compares the base income transfer of the diplomatic pact

## incorporation_progress
Scopes: state

Check incorporation progress in state

## influence
Scopes: country

Compares the available influence of the scoped country

## influence_usage
Scopes: country

Compares the consumed influence of the scoped country

## infrastructure
Scopes: state, state_region

Compares the infrastructure value of a given state

## infrastructure_delta
Scopes: state, state_region

Compares the infrastructure balance of a given state

## infrastructure_usage
Scopes: state, state_region

Compares the infrastructure usage value of a given state

## initiator_is
Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Checks who the initiator of a diplomatic play is

## institution_investment_level
Scopes: country

Compares the level of investment in an institution

## interest_group_population
Scopes: interest_group

Compares population number in an interest group

## interest_group_population_percentage
Scopes: interest_group

Compares percentage of population in an interest group

## interest_group_supports_political_movement
Scopes: interest_group

Checks whether the scoped interest group supports a political movement

## invasion_has_marines
Scopes: invasion

Checks if any combat unit in the scoped invasion's armies is a marine

## investment_pool
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of money saved in its investment pool

## investment_pool_gross_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of gross income (income before expenses) for its investment pool

## investment_pool_net_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of net income (income after expenses) for its investment pool

## is_adjacent_to_country
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is adjacent to a target country

## is_adjacent_to_market
Scopes: market
Targets: market

Checks if market in scope is adjacent to a target market

## is_adjacent_to_state
Scopes: country
Targets: state

Checks if country in scope is adjacent to a target state

## is_adult
Scopes: character

Check if character is an adult

## is_advancing_on_front
Scopes: character
Targets: front

Checks if a commander is advancing on a front

## is_ai
Scopes: country

True if country scope is controlled by an AI

## is_army
Scopes: military_formation

Checks if a military formation is Army

## is_at_war
Scopes: country

Check if the country is at war

## is_attacker_in_battle
Scopes: character, ship

Checks if a Commander or Ship is attacker in a battle

## is_auto_assigned
Scopes: character_role

Checks if the character role is auto assigned

## is_banning_goods
Scopes: country

Check if a country is banning a good

## is_being_bolstered
Scopes: political_movement

Check if scoped movement is being bolstered

## is_being_bombarded
Scopes: state

Checks if a state is currently being port bombarded by a hostile fleet

## is_being_suppressed
Scopes: political_movement

Check if scoped movement is being suppressed

## is_blockaded_by
Scopes: state
Targets: country

Checks if a state is blockaded by a country

## is_buildable
Scopes: building

Check if a building is buildable = yes (default)

## is_building_group
Scopes: building

True if scope is a building of given group
building_group = building

## is_building_type
Scopes: building

True if scope is a building of given type

## is_building_type_expanded
Scopes: none

Checks if the CProductionMethodsPanelEntry for a particular CBuildingType is expanded

## is_busy
Scopes: character

Check if character is busy

## is_capital
Scopes: state

Check if state is the capital of the owner = bool

## is_character_alive
Scopes: character

Checks if the scoped character is alive

## is_character_role
Scopes: character_role

Checks if the scoped character role is a specific role

## is_character_role_type
Scopes: character_role

Checks if the scoped character role is of a specific archetype

## is_civil_war_type
Scopes: civil_war

Check if the scoped civil war is of a specific type

## is_coastal
Scopes: state

Check if state borders a (non-impassable) sea region

## is_company_type
Scopes: company
Targets: company_type

Checks if scoped company is of the specified type

## is_considered_adjacent_due_to_wargoals
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped country is considered adjacent to the target country by virtue of the scoped country having war goals that are adjacent to the target country in a committed diplomatic play

## is_construction_paused
Scopes: country

Check if construction in a state is paused.

## is_consumed_by_government_buildings
Scopes: market_goods

Check if the market goods is instrumental in running the bureaucratic machine

## is_consumed_by_military_buildings
Scopes: market_goods

Check if the goods is instrumental in running the war machine

## is_country_alive
Scopes: country

Checks if the scoped country is alive, i.e. if it has at least one state on the map and can be interacted with

## is_country_type
Scopes: country

Checks the countrys type

## is_damaged
Scopes: ship

Checks if a ship is damaged

## is_defender_in_battle
Scopes: character, ship

Checks if a Commander or Ship is defender in a battle

## is_desired_by
Scopes: treaty_article, treaty_article_options
Targets: country

Check if the scoped article or article_options has positive inherent acceptance with the target country
scope:treaty_article = {
	is_desired_by = c:FRA
}

## is_diplomatic_action_type
Scopes: diplomatic_pact

Checks diplomatic pact is of a certain action type

Scopes: diplomatic_catalyst

Checks diplomatic catalyst is of a certain catalyst type

## is_diplomatic_pact_in_danger
Scopes: diplomatic_pact

Checks if diplomatic pact is in danger of breaking

Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is in a diplomatic play together with event target

is_diplomatic_play_participant = bool

Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is in a diplomatic play against event target

## is_diplomatic_play_initiator
Scopes: country

True if country is the initiator of any diplomatic play

Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is involved in the same diplomatic play as event target

## is_diplomatic_play_participant_with
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is a committed participant in the same diplomatic play as event target

## is_diplomatic_play_target
Scopes: country

True if country is the target of any diplomatic play

Scopes: diplomatic_play

Checks diplomatic play is of a certain type

Scopes: country

True if country is a undecided participant of any diplomatic play
is_diplomatic_play_participant = bool

## is_direct_subject_of
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope is a direct subject (not subject-of-subject) of event target

## is_doing_piracy_in_region
Scopes: military_formation
Targets: strategic_region

## is_employed
Scopes: pop

Check if the pop is employed

## is_enacting_law
Scopes: country
Targets: law_type

Checks if the scoped country is enacting a specific law type.

## is_enforced
Scopes: treaty

Checks if the scoped treaty is enforced on either party
scope:some_treaty = {
	if = { limit = {
		is_enforced = yes
	}}
}

## is_equal_exchange_for
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped treaty is considered an equal exchange by target country,
scope:some_treaty = {
	if = { limit = {
		is_equal_exchange_for = c:FRA
	}}
}

## is_exchanging_obligations
Scopes: treaty_options, treaty

Checks if the scoped treaty is exchanging any obligations,
scope:some_treaty = {
	if = { limit = {
		 is_exchanging_obligations= yes
	}}
}

## is_expanding_institution
Scopes: country

Are you expanding an institution

## is_exported_to
Scopes: market_goods
Targets: market

Whether the scoped market goods are being exported to the target market by the local market
is_exporter = scope:example_market

Targets: country

Checks if the scoped country is forced to join the target country's Diplomatic Plays

scope:treaty = {
	is_fulfilled_by = c:FRA
}

	is_giftable_to = c:FRA
}

}

## is_homeland_of_country_cultures
Scopes: state
Targets: country

Checks if state is homeland of any of the target country's primary cultures

## is_immortal
Scopes: character

checks if the scoped character is immortal
scope:abbath = { is_immortal = yes }

## is_immune_to_revolutions
Scopes: country

Checks if the country has been set to be immune to revolutions via set_immune_to_revolutions
Warning: This does not check if the country is naturally immune to revolutions due to for example being a revolutionary country itself, only for the effects of set_immune_to_revolutions.

## is_imported_from
Scopes: market_goods
Targets: market

Whether the scoped market goods are being imported from the Target market by the local market
is_importer = scope:example_market

Scopes: state

Mass migration target is state.
any_state = { limit = { owner = ROOT is_mass_migration_target = yes } }

## is_objective_completed
Scopes: none

## is_owed_obligation_by
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if the scoped country is owed a obligation by the target country

## is_panel_open
Scopes: none

Checks if a certain infopanel is open, specified as an event target (target) or as a string (panel_name). Specify an optional named tab (tab_name) to check if this tab is open.

## is_party
Scopes: party
Targets: party

Checks if the target party is same as scoped party. Will only work on exact same party object, meaning you can't compare across countries.

## is_party_type
Scopes: party

Checks if the scoped party's type is the specified one

Scopes: country

True if country scope is a player

scope:some_treaty = {
	if = { limit = {
		is_renegotiation = yes
	}}
}

is_interest_group_type = scope:neighbor_leading_ig

scope:example_state = { is_split_state = yes }

Check if the state region is on land

is_accepted_religion = <country>

## is_target_in_global_variable_list
Scopes: none

Checks if a target is in a variable list
is_target_in_variable_list = { name = X target = Y }
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is an event target

## is_target_in_local_variable_list
Scopes: none

Checks if a target is in a variable list
is_target_in_variable_list = { name = X target = Y }
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is an event target

## is_target_in_variable_list
Scopes: none

Checks if a target is in a variable list
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is an event target

## is_target_of_wargoal

Targets: country

has_war_goal = <country>

Scopes: war
Targets: country

has_embargo = <goods key/scope>

Scopes: none

Checks if character template has already been used

## is_theme_selected
Scopes: none

has_country_unification_candidate = GER

Scopes: country
