## is_vulnerable_front
Scopes: front
Targets: country

Whether the scoped Front doesn't have any Battalions nor Generals on target side, and the enemy has at least one General.

## is_war
Scopes: diplomatic_play

True if the diplomatic play has escalated into war

## is_war_participant
Scopes: war
Targets: country

Check if the target country is participant in a war

## is_warleader
Scopes: war
Targets: country

Check if country is warleader in war

## is_world_market_hub
Scopes: state

Check if state is a world market hub

## isolated_states
Scopes: country

Compare number of Isolated States

## journal_entry_age
Scopes: journal_entry

Return the age of the journal entry (since activation) in days

## law_approved_by
Scopes: law

Checks whether the scoped law is approved by an interest group

## law_enactment_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has about enactment of the specified law compared to the current active law in the same group

## law_is_available
Scopes: law

Checks if a law is available for its country, considering its current situation. Like can_be_enacted, but ignores government support

## law_progressiveness_difference
Scopes: law_type

Compares the progressiveness of the scoped law type to the target law type, higher value means greater difference
"law_progressiveness_difference( scope:target_law )" > 50

## law_stance
Scopes: character, interest_group, political_movement

Compares the base stance of the scoped character, movement or interest group has about the specified law, ignoring the current active law in the same group

## leading_producer_of
Scopes: country
Targets: goods

Checks if country is producing the most of a certain good

## leads_customs_union
Scopes: country

Check if any other country is part of this country's customs union

## levels_owned_by_country
Scopes: building

Compares how many levels a country or investors in that country own in a building
 levels_owned_by_country = {
 target = c:GBR
 value  >= 1

## leverage_advantage
Scopes: power_bloc

Checks that the leverage advantage between power bloc and target country meets condition
power_bloc =
{
		leverage = { target = c:BEL value > 0 }
}

## liberty_desire
Scopes: country

Compare trigger for the Liberty Desire value in a scoped country.

## liberty_desire_weekly_progress
Scopes: country

Compare trigger for the weekly Liberty Desire progress value in a scoped country.

## liberty_desire_weekly_progress_from_support_independence
Scopes: country

Compare trigger for the weekly Liberty Desire progress value from the scoped country having their independence supported.

## lifetime_piracy_income
Scopes: character

Compares the lifetime piracy income of a character

## list_size
Scopes: none

Checks the size of a list
Where X is the name of the list
Where Y is a script value

## literacy_rate
Scopes: country, pop, state

Checks if a pop, state or country has a certain amount of literacy
literacy = value

## lobby_clout
Scopes: political_lobby

Compare to total clout of scoped lobby's interest groups

## lobby_formation_reason
Scopes: diplomatic_catalyst, political_lobby

Check scope diplomatic catalyst or political lobby scope for lobby formation reason

## local_variable_list_size
Scopes: none

Checks the size of a variable list
variable_list_size = { name = X target >= Y }
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is a script value or number

## loyalist_fraction
Scopes: country, state

Compares loyalist fraction in pops in state or country, all parameters except value are optional

## loyalists
Scopes: state

Compares the loyalty in a given state, i.e. the fraction of Loyalists

## loyalty
Scopes: character

Compares the character loyalty

## market_access
Scopes: state

Checks the market access of the scoped state

## market_consumption_share
Scopes: market

Compare fraction of scope market consumption coming from target country

## market_exports
Scopes: market

Compare total units of exports from scope to target market (if set) or world market in general (if no market specified)

## market_exports_reliance
Scopes: market

Compare fraction of buy orders in scope market that are due to exports to target market (if set) or world market in general (if no market specified)

## market_goods_buy_orders
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of buy orders
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_cheaper
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods is at least the specified percentage cheaper than base price
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_consumption
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of total consumption
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_delta
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market has the specified goods delta (production + imports) - (consumption + exports)
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_export_share
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods exports are the specified fraction of world market exports
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_exports
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of exports
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_has_goods_shortage
Scopes: market_goods

Check if market goods has a shortage in the market

## market_goods_import_share
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods imports are the specified fraction of world market imports
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_imports
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of imports
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_pricier
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods is at least the specified percentage more expensive than base price
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_production
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of total production
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_sell_orders
Scopes: market_goods

Checks if market goods has the specified number of sell orders
Where X = fixed point

## market_goods_shortage_ratio
Scopes: market_goods

Compares the shortage ratio of a market goods in its market

## market_has_goods_shortage
Scopes: market

Check if market has a shortage on any of its building inputs

## market_imports
Scopes: market

Compare total units of imports from target to scope market

## market_imports_reliance
Scopes: market

Compare fraction of buy orders in scope market that are due to imports from target market (if set) or world market in general (if no market specified)

## market_number_goods_shortages
Scopes: market

Check how many shortages a market has on any of its building inputs

## market_number_goods_shortages_with
Scopes: market

Check how many shortages a market has on any of its building inputs, plus the ones from the target country
"market_number_goods_shortages_with(scope:target) >= 2"

## market_number_goods_shortages_without
Scopes: market

Check how many shortages a market has on any of its building inputs, subtracting the ones from the target country
"market_number_goods_shortages_without(scope:target) >= 2"

## market_prestige_goods_buy_orders
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the buy orders of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_consumption
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the consumption value of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_delta
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the delta (sell orders - buy orders) of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_export_share
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the world market expore share of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_exports
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the export value of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_import_share
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the world market export share of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_imports
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the import value of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_production
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the production value of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_prestige_goods_sell_orders
Scopes: market_goods

Compare the sell orders of a specific prestige good type in the market

## market_production_share
Scopes: market

Compare fraction of scope market production coming from target country

## market_trade
Scopes: market

Compare total units of goods traded between scope market and target market (if set) or world market in general (if no market specified)

## market_trade_reliance
Scopes: market

Compare fraction of buy and sell orders in scope market that are due to trade with target market (if set) or world market in general (if no market specified)

## max_contraventions
Scopes: treaty_article, treaty_article_options

Check the maximum contraventions for the article type of the scoped article or article_options
scope:treaty_article = {
	max_contraventions >= 1
}

## max_law_enactment_setbacks
Scopes: country

Compares to the max number of law enactment setbacks a country can suffer before the law fails

## max_num_companies
Scopes: country

The limit of how many companies the scoped country is allowed to have
num_num_companies > 0

## military_ship_maintenance_fulfillment
Scopes: country

Compares the military ship maintenance fulfillment ratio of a country

## military_wage_level
Scopes: country

Compares the military wage level of scoped country

## military_wage_level_value
Scopes: country

Compares the military wage level value of scoped country

## month
Scopes: none

Compare to current game date month (Jan: 0, Dec: 11)

## most_powerful_strata
Scopes: interest_group

Compares an interest groups most powerful strata

## most_prominent_revolting_interest_group
Scopes: state

Checks if the most prominent revolting interest group in the scoped state has the given interest group type. Evaluates false if the scoped state is not in revolt.

## movement_can_cause_obstinance
Scopes: political_movement

Check if the political movement can generate obstinance in states

## movement_is_causing_obstinance
Scopes: political_movement

Check if the political movement is causing obstinance in any state

## movement_pressure
Scopes: political_movement

Compares the pressure of the scoped movement on the target IG
movement_pressure( ig:intelligentsia ) > 0.1

## nand
Scopes: none

a negated AND trigger

## nationalization_cost
Scopes: country

Compares the total cost of nationalizing all buildings in scope country owned by the government or pops of target country

## naval_power_projection
Scopes: country

Compare to a country's total navy power projection
 scope:example_country = { naval_power_projection < root.naval_power_projection

## neighbors_any_power_bloc
Scopes: country

Checks if the scoped country neighbors any power bloc. Note: the scoped country is not considered to be neighboring the power bloc it belongs to (if any)

## neighbors_member_of_same_power_bloc
Scopes: country

Checks if the scoped country neighbors any other country belonging to the same power bloc

## neighbors_power_bloc
Scopes: country
Targets: power_bloc

Checks if the scoped country neighbors the target power bloc. Note: the scoped country is not considered to be neighboring the power bloc it belongs to (if any)

## net_fixed_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of income after expenses (counting only fixed income & expenses)

## net_total_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of income after expenses (counting all income & expenses)

## night_value
Scopes: none

Night value

## nor
Scopes: none

a negated OR trigger

## not
Scopes: none

negates content of trigger

## num_casualties
Scopes: war

Checks the number of total casualties in the scoped war

## num_companies
Scopes: country

How many companies the scoped country has

## num_contraventions
Scopes: treaty_article

Check if the scoped article has the given number of contravention from the given country
scope:treaty_article = {
	num_contraventions = {
		target = c:FRA
		value > 0
	}
}

## num_country_casualties
Scopes: war

Checks the number of casualties for the target country in the scoped war

## num_country_dead
Scopes: war

Checks the number of dead for the target country in the scoped war

## num_country_wounded
Scopes: war

Checks the number of wounded for the target country in the scoped war

## num_cultural_communities
Scopes: state

Check cultural communities in state

## num_dead
Scopes: war

Checks the number of total dead in the scoped war

## num_diplomatic_pacts
Scopes: country

Compare to a country's number of diplomatic pacts of the specified type

## num_front_casualties
Scopes: front

Checks the number of casualties for the target country in the scoped front

## num_front_dead
Scopes: front

Checks the number of dead for the target country in the scoped front

## num_front_wounded
Scopes: front

Checks the number of wounded for the target country in the scoped front

## num_investments_of_type
Scopes: country

Checks the number of buildings levels of a given type the scoped country has outside their own country.
 num_investments_of_type = { type = building_oil_rig value > 5 }

## num_mobilized_units_in_theater
Scopes: theater

Determines the number of mobilized units belonging to the scoped theater's owner or their allies, in fronts intersecting the scoped theater

## num_political_lobbies
Scopes: country, interest_group

Compare to number of political lobbies in scoped country or interest group

## num_potential_resources
Scopes: state

Checks the amount of the specified building type allowed in the state. Will return an error if used on building types that are not level capped
num_potential_resources(building_rubber_plantation) > 0

## num_power_bloc_members
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the number of members in a power bloc against a value

## num_power_bloc_states
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the number of states in a power bloc against a value

## num_provinces_in_theater
Scopes: theater

Determines the number provinces in the scoped theater

## num_subjects
Scopes: country

Compares the number of subjects of scoped country

## num_taxed_goods
Scopes: country

Compares the number of consumption taxed goods of scoped country

## num_wounded
Scopes: war

Checks the number of total wounded in the scoped war

## number_of_claims
Scopes: country

The number of claims on foreign states the country has

## number_of_possible_decisions
Scopes: country

The number of possible Descision a Country can take
umber_of_possible_decisions > 0

## obstinance
Scopes: state

Compares state obstinance

## occupancy
Scopes: building

Evaluates a building's current occupancy

## or
Scopes: none

at least one entry inside trigger must be true

## organization
Scopes: military_formation

Compares the Organization of the Military Formation in scope

## organization_target
Scopes: military_formation

Compares the target Organization of the Military Formation in scope

## overlord_can_decrease_subject_autonomy
Scopes: country

Check if an overlord can decrease a subject autonomy

## owes_obligation_to
Scopes: country
Targets: country

Checks if country in scope owes a obligation to event target

## owns_entire_state_region
Scopes: country

Check if country owns entire region

## owns_treaty_port_in
Scopes: country

Does country own the treaty port in assigned state region

## play_participant_has_war_goal_of_type_against
Scopes: country

Checks if scope country holds a war goal of a specific type targeting a specific country in any diplomatic play

## play_side_has_war_goal_of_type_against
Scopes: country

Checks if any country on the same side as scope country in any diplomatic play holds a war goal of a specific type targeting a specificcountry

## political_movement_identity_support
Scopes: political_movement

Compare pop with correct culture/religion identity support of political movement

## political_movement_military_support
Scopes: political_movement

Compare military support of political movement

## political_movement_popular_support
Scopes: political_movement

Compare popular support of political movement

## political_movement_radicalism
Scopes: political_movement

Compare radicalism of political movement

## political_movement_support
Scopes: political_movement

Compare support of political movement

## political_movement_wealth_support
Scopes: political_movement

Compare wealth support of political movement

## political_strength_share
Scopes: country, state

Checks the political strength share of a pop type, religion or culture in a country or state. Exactly one of pop_type, religion or culture must be specified.
	pop_type/religion/culture = <key/scope>
	value <compare operator> <value>
}

## politically_involved_ratio
Scopes: country

Compares the percentage of politically involved population in a country

## pollution_amount
Scopes: state_region

Compare state region pollution

## pollution_generation
Scopes: state

Compare total pollution generation across all buildings in the state

## pop_acceptance
Scopes: pop

Compares the scoped pop's acceptance against an acceptence value

## pop_employment_building
Scopes: pop

Checks if pop is working in a specific building type

## pop_employment_building_group
Scopes: pop

Checks if pop is working in a specific building type
pop_employment_building = building

## pop_has_primary_culture
Scopes: pop

Checks if pop's culture is primary

## pop_loyalist_fraction
Scopes: pop

Compares the number of Radicals in a pop to its total size

## pop_neutral_fraction
Scopes: pop

Compares the number of Neutrals (not Radical, not Loyalist) in a pop to its total size

## pop_radical_fraction
Scopes: pop

Compares the number of Radicals in a pop to its total size

## pop_type_percent_country
Scopes: country

Checks whether the scoped country has <percent> of its population belonging to the specified pop type
scope:example_country = {
	pop_type_percent_country = {
		pop_type = <pop_type>
		percent <compare operator (<,>,= and so on)> <percent>
	}
}

## pop_type_percent_state
Scopes: state

Checks that a state's population has a certain percentage of a specific pop type
scope:example_state = {
  pop_type_percent_state = {
    target = pop_type:laborer
    value <= 0.8
  }
}

## population_by_culture
Scopes: state

Compare the current population of a target culture in the scoped state

## potential_diplomatic_play_power_ratio
Scopes: country

Check the expected power ratio between scope country side and target country side in a potential diplomatic play
Attempts to predict which sides involved participants will take (if any) so doesn't just check 'starting strengths'
state and type are optional, will default to dp_open_market on target capital

## potential_income
Scopes: country

Compare the potential income of the country (weekly income plus tax waste)

## power_bloc_rank
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare a power bloc's rank
power_bloc =
{
		power_bloc_rank <= 2
}

## power_bloc_share_gdp
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc current members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc

## power_bloc_share_gdp_with
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members plus an additional country, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_gdp_with(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_share_gdp_without
Scopes: country

Compare the share of GDP of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members minus one of the members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_gdp_without(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_share_power_projection
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Power Projection of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc

## power_bloc_share_power_projection_with
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Power Projection of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members plus an additional country, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_power_projection_with(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_share_power_projection_without
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Power Projection of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members minus one of the members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_power_projection_without(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_share_prestige
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Prestige of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc

## power_bloc_share_prestige_with
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Prestige of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members plus an additional country, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_prestige_with(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_share_prestige_without
Scopes: country

Compare the share of Prestige of the country in scope against all its Power Bloc members minus one of the members, returns -1 if not in a Power Bloc
"power_bloc_share_prestige_without(scope:country) > 0.2"

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_with
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking, plus one additional country not currently in the power bloc.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.
"power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_with(scope:target) > 15"

## power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_without
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare how many members are among the leading producers for all goods worldwide weighted by their position in the ranking, minus one country that is currently in the power bloc.The top producer is weighted by MIN_SPOT_PRESTIGE_AWARD and then each subsequent position is weighted by one less until.By default this means 1st counts as 3, 2nd as 2 and 3rd as 1. Any other positions as 0.
"power_bloc_total_leading_goods_producers_without(scope:target) > 15"

## power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the member with the lowest economic dependence on the leader.

## power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the member with the lowest economic dependence on the leader.
power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence > 2.2

## power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the member with the lowest economic dependence on the leader.
power_bloc_worst_economic_dependence > 2.2

## power_bloc_worst_infamy
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Infamy value of the member country with the worst (highest) Infamy

## power_bloc_worst_infamy_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Infamy value of the member country with the worst (highest) Infamy
power_bloc_worst_infamy > 50

## power_bloc_worst_infamy_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Infamy value of the member country with the worst (highest) Infamy
power_bloc_worst_infamy > 50

## power_bloc_worst_leader_relations
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Relations value to the power bloc leader for the member country with the worst (lowest) Relations

## power_bloc_worst_leader_relations_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Relations value to the power bloc leader for the member country with the worst (lowest) Relations
power_bloc_worst_leader_relations > 10

## power_bloc_worst_leader_relations_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Relations value to the power bloc leader for the member country with the worst (lowest) Relations
power_bloc_worst_leader_relations > 10

## power_bloc_worst_leader_religion_population_fraction
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the lowest population fraction in a member country that follows the leader's religion.

## power_bloc_worst_leader_religion_population_fraction_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the lowest population fraction in a member country that follows the leader's religion.
power_bloc_worst_leader_religion_population_fraction > 10

## power_bloc_worst_leader_religion_population_fraction_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the lowest population fraction in a member country that follows the leader's religion.
power_bloc_worst_leader_religion_population_fraction > 10

## power_bloc_worst_liberty_desire
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Liberty Desire value of the member country with the worst (highest) Liberty Desire

## power_bloc_worst_liberty_desire_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Liberty Desire value of the member country with the worst (highest) Liberty Desire
power_bloc_worst_liberty_desire > 75

## power_bloc_worst_liberty_desire_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the Liberty Desire value of the member country with the worst (highest) Liberty Desire
power_bloc_worst_liberty_desire > 75

## power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_difference_government_type
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the total Progressiveness value difference for the member country with the worst (highest) difference in progressiveness between their Governance Principles and Distribution of Power Laws compared to the power bloc leader
power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_compatibility_government_type > 100

## power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_difference_government_type_with
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the total Progressiveness value difference for the member country with the worst (highest) difference in progressiveness between their Governance Principles and Distribution of Power Laws compared to the power bloc leader
power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_compatibility_government_type > 100

## power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_difference_government_type_without
Scopes: power_bloc

If used in a power bloc scope, compare the total Progressiveness value difference for the member country with the worst (highest) difference in progressiveness between their Governance Principles and Distribution of Power Laws compared to the power bloc leader
power_bloc_worst_progressiveness_compatibility_government_type > 100

## power_projection_value
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's power projection

## predicted_cohesion_percentage_with
Scopes: power_bloc

Predicts the cohesion of a Power Bloc (as a fraction of 1) if it included target country as a member
predicted_cohesion_percentage_with, = { target = scope:other_country value > 0.9 }

## prefers_law
Scopes: interest_group

Checks if the scoped interest group prefers the specified law to the comparison law

## prestige
Scopes: country

Compare prestige

## primary_cultures_percent_country
Scopes: country

Checks that a country's population has a certain percentage of the country's primary cultures
scope:example_country = {
  primary_cultures_percent_country >= 0.2
}

## primary_cultures_percent_state
Scopes: state

Checks that a state's population has a certain percentage of the country's primary cultures
scope:example_state = {
  primary_cultures_percent_state >= 0.2
}

## primary_role
Scopes: character

Checks if the character's primary role is the specified role

## private_ownership_fraction
Scopes: building

Compares the fraction of this building's levels that are privately owned
 private_ownership_fraction > 0.5

## produced_authority
Scopes: country

Compares the produced authority of the scoped country

## produced_bureaucracy
Scopes: country

Compares the produced bureaucracy of the scoped country

## produced_influence
Scopes: country

Compares the produced influence of the scoped country

## progressiveness
Scopes: law_type

Compare the progressiveness of the law type in scope
law_type:law_isolationism.progressiveness > 50

## prominence
Scopes: character

Compares the character prominence

## quality_of_life
Scopes: pop

Compares the quality of life of the given pop

## radical_fraction
Scopes: country, state

Compares radical fraction in pops in state or country, all parameters except value are optional

## radical_population_fraction
Scopes: country

Compares the fraction of the population that are radicals in a given country

## real_month
Scopes: none

Compare to current real date month (Jan: 1, Dec: 12)

## region_score
Scopes: country

Compares the aggregated AI strategy region score for the specified strategic region in country scope
Returns 0 in case the country is player controled
"region_score(sr:region_key)" >= 300

## relative_authority
Scopes: country

Compares the unused fraction of authority for the scoped country

## relative_bureaucracy
Scopes: country

Compares the unused fraction of bureaucracy for the scoped country

## relative_export_advantage
Scopes: state_goods

Compare to state goods relative export advantage

## relative_import_advantage
Scopes: state_goods

Compare to state goodsrelative  import advantage

## relative_influence
Scopes: country

Compares the unused fraction of influence for the scoped country

## relative_infrastructure
Scopes: state

Compares the infrastructure to infrastructure usage of a state

## religion_percent_country
Scopes: country

Checks that a country's population has a certain percentage of a specific religion
scope:example_country = {
  religion_percent_country = {
    target = rel:catholic
    value <= 0.8
  }
}

## religion_percent_state
Scopes: state

Checks that a state's population has a certain percentage of a specific religion
scope:example_state = {
  religion_percent_state = {
    target = rel:catholic
    value <= 0.8
  }
}

## remaining_career_length
Scopes: character

Checks if the character's remaining career length meets a duration threshold. Role can be a specific database role, a role type, or omitted to use the role furthest from career end.

## remaining_undepleted
Scopes: state_region

Check remaining amount of resource, like gold mines in a state
	type = building_gold_mine
	amount > 1
}

## role_priority
Scopes: character_role

Compares the priority of the character role

## ruler_can_have_command
Scopes: country

Checks if the country's government type allows its ruler to have command

## save_temporary_scope_as
Scopes: none

Saves a temporary target for use during the trigger execution

## save_temporary_scope_value_as
Scopes: none

Saves a numerical or bool value as an arbitrarily-named temporary target to be referenced later in the same effect

## scaled_debt
Scopes: country

Compare value to a country's debt relative to debt ceiling

## scaled_gold_reserves
Scopes: country

Compare value to a country's gold reserves relative to reserves limit

## scripted_bar_progress
Scopes: journal_entry

Determines the progress of a scripted progress bar

## self_ownership_fraction
Scopes: building

Compares the fraction of this building's levels that are owned by the building itself
 self_ownership_fraction > 0.5

## shares_heritage_trait_group_with_any_primary_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if culture shares any trait group marked as 'heritage' with any of a country's primary cultures

## shares_heritage_trait_group_with_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: culture

Checks if culture shares any trait group marked as 'heritage' with another culture

## shares_heritage_trait_group_with_religion
Scopes: religion
Targets: religion

Checks if the religion shares any heritage trait group with another religion
shares_heritage_trait_with_religion = <religion>

## shares_heritage_trait_group_with_state_religion
Scopes: religion
Targets: country

Checks if the religion shares any heritage trait group with a country's state religion

## shares_heritage_trait_with_any_primary_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'heritage' with any of a country's primary cultures

## shares_heritage_trait_with_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: culture

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'heritage' with another culture

## shares_heritage_trait_with_religion
Scopes: religion
Targets: religion

Checks if the religion shares any heritage trait with another religion

## shares_heritage_trait_with_state_religion
Scopes: religion
Targets: country

Checks if the religion shares any heritage trait with a country's religion

## shares_language_trait_group_with_any_primary_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if culture shares any trait group marked as 'language' with any of a country's primary cultures

## shares_language_trait_group_with_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: culture

Checks if culture shares any trait group marked as 'language' with another culture

## shares_language_trait_with_any_primary_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'language' with any of a country's primary cultures

## shares_language_trait_with_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: culture

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'language' with another culture

## shares_tradition_trait_with_any_primary_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: country

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'tradition' with any of a country's primary cultures

## shares_tradition_trait_with_culture
Scopes: culture
Targets: culture

Checks if culture shares any trait marked as 'tradition' with another culture

## ship_modification_market_demand_ratio
Scopes: country

Goods-weighted buy/sell ratio for the construction goods of the target ship modification, evaluated against the country-scope's market.
"ship_modification_market_demand_ratio(scope:ship_modification_type) > 1.25"

## should_set_wargoal
Scopes: country

## should_show_nudity
Scopes: none

can nudity be shown?

## shrinking_institution
Scopes: country

Checks if the institution is shrinking
expanding_institution = <scope/key>

## size_weighted_lost_battles_fraction
Scopes: country

Determines the fraction of battles the target country has lost in the target war, weighted by manpower size of all battles in the war
add = "size_weighted_lost_battles_fraction(scope:war)"

## sol_ranking
Scopes: country

Compares a Country's Standard of Living Ranking (position)

## spawns_characters_to_pool
Scopes: character_role

Checks if the character role spawns characters to the pool

## speed
Scopes: ship

Compare a ship's speed

## stall_chance
Scopes: country

Compares the current enactment stall chance in scope country (including values from enactment modifier)

## stall_chance_for_law
Scopes: country

Compares the enactment stall chance in scope country for given law (including values from enactment modifier)

## stall_chance_for_law_without_enactment_modifier
Scopes: country

Compares the enactment stall chance in scope country for given law but excludes values from enactment modifier

## stall_chance_without_enactment_modifier
Scopes: country

Compares the current enactment stall chance in scope country but excludes values from enactment modifier

## standard_of_living
Scopes: pop

Compares the standard of living of a given pop

## starting_manpower
Scopes: battle_side

Compares the starting manpower of a battle side

## state_average_culture_and_religion_pop_acceptance
Scopes: state

Average acceptance of state pops of a specific culture and religion.

## state_average_culture_pop_acceptance
Scopes: state

Average acceptance of state pops of a specific culture.

## state_average_religion_pop_acceptance
Scopes: state

Average acceptance of state pops of a specific religion.

## state_cultural_acceptance
Scopes: state

Checks how accepted a pop of the target culture is in the scoped state
 state_cultural_acceptance = {
 target = cu:french
 value  >= 50

## state_exports
Scopes: state

Compare total units of exports from scope to target state (if set) or world state in general (if no state specified)

## state_goods_cheaper
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state goods is at least the specified percentage cheaper than base price
Where X = fixed point

## state_goods_consumption
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state goods has the specified number of total consumption
Where X = fixed point

## state_goods_delta
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state has the specified goods delta (production - consumption)
Where X = fixed point

## state_goods_has_local_goods_shortage
Scopes: state_goods

Check if state goods has a shortage in a state, but NOT in the whole market

## state_goods_pricier
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state goods is at least the specified percentage more expensive than base price
Where X = fixed point

## state_goods_production
Scopes: state_goods

Checks if state goods has the specified number of total production
Where X = fixed point

## state_has_building_group_levels
Scopes: state

Checks the sum of building levels for a building group in a state
 state_has_building_group_levels = {
 type = bg_heavy_industry
 value >= 100 }

## state_has_building_levels
Scopes: state

Checks the sum of building levels for a state

## state_has_building_type_levels
Scopes: state

Checks the sum of building levels for a building type in a state
 state_has_building_type_levels = {
 target = bt:building_barracks
 value >= 100

## state_has_goods_shortage
Scopes: state

Check if state has a shortage on any of its building inputs

## state_has_national_awakening
Scopes: state

Checks if the scoped state is in a state region with an active national awakening map marker

## state_imports
Scopes: state

Compare total units of imports from target to scope state

## state_is_eligible_as_mass_migration_target
Scopes: state

Check if state can receive a mass migration at all.
any_state = { limit = { state_is_eligible_as_mass_migration_target = yes } }

## state_population
Scopes: state

Checks the total population of the scoped state

Scopes: state

Checks how accepted a pop of the given religion is in the the scoped state
 state_religious_acceptance = {
 target = re:catholic
 value  >= 50

## state_trade
Scopes: state

Compare total units of goods traded between scope state and target state (if set) or world state in general (if no state specified)

## state_unemployment_rate
Scopes: state

Checks the unemployment rate (percentage) in the scoped state

## strata
Scopes: pop

Checks the strata of the scoped pop

## subject_can_increase_autonomy
Scopes: country

Check if a subject can increase its autonomy

## supply_network_strength
Scopes: country

Compares the country's supply network strength (can exceed 1)

## supply_ship_maintenance_fulfillment
Scopes: country

Compares the supply ship maintenance fulfillment ratio of a country

## switch
Scopes: none

Switch on a trigger for the evaluation of another trigger with an optional fallback trigger.
	trigger = simple_assign_trigger
	case_1 = { <triggers> }
	case_2 = { <triggers> }
	case_n = { <triggers> }
	fallback = { <triggers> }

## taking_loans
Scopes: country

Check if the country is currently running a weekly deficit and taking loans to compensate

## target_cohesion_number
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the target Cohesion as a numeric value

## target_cohesion_percentage
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare the target Cohesion as a percentage of the maximum of a Power Bloc in scope

## target_is
Scopes: diplomatic_play
Targets: country

Checks who the target of a diplomatic play is

## tax_capacity
Scopes: state

Checks the taxation capacity of the scoped state

## tax_capacity_usage
Scopes: state

Checks the taxation capacity usage of the scoped state

## tax_level
Scopes: country

Compares the overall tax level of scoped country

## tax_level_value
Scopes: country

Compares the overall tax level integer value of scoped country
income_tax_level_value = <level>

## tax_waste
Scopes: country

Compare the tax waste of the country

## tenure_in_current_power_bloc_days
Scopes: country

Compare the number of days the country in scope has been a member of their current Power Bloc

## tenure_in_current_power_bloc_months
Scopes: country

Compare the number of (whole) months the country in scope has been a member of their current Power Bloc

## tenure_in_current_power_bloc_weeks
Scopes: country

Compare the number of (whole) weeks the country in scope has been a member of their current Power Bloc

## tenure_in_current_power_bloc_years
Scopes: country

Compare the number of (whole) years the country in scope has been a member of their current Power Bloc

## total_expenses
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of expenses, including from temporary sources

## total_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of income, including from temporary sources

## total_population
Scopes: country

Compares the total population of a given country

## total_population_including_subjects
Scopes: country

Compares the total population in the scope country and its subjects

## total_population_including_subjects_share
Scopes: country

Compares the total population in the scope country and its subjects' share of the global population

## total_population_share
Scopes: country

Compares the total population of a given country's share of the global population

## total_size
Scopes: pop

Compares the total size of the scoped pop

## total_urbanization
Scopes: state

Compares the total urbanization of a given state/ntotal_urbanization > 5

## total_used_principle_levels
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare a power bloc's total number of active principle levels
power_bloc =
{
	total_used_principle_levels >= 10}

## trait_value
Scopes: character

Compares the character's total trait value

## transfer_money_gross_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of gross income (income before expenses) from money transfer treaties	ransfer_money_gross_income > 1000

## transfer_money_net_income
Scopes: country

Does the country have this amount of net income (income after expenses) from money transfer treaties	ransfer_money_net_income > 1000

## trigger_else
Scopes: none

Evaluates the triggers if the display_triggers of preceding 'trigger_if' or 'trigger_else_if' is not mettrigger_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }
 trigger_else = { <triggers> }

## trigger_else_if
Scopes: none

Evaluates the enclosed triggers if the display_triggers of the preceding `trigger_if` or `trigger_else_if` is not met and its own display_trigger of the limit is mettrigger_if = { limit = { <display_triggers> } <triggers> }

## trigger_if
Scopes: none

Evaluates the triggers if the display_triggers of the limit are met

## turmoil
Scopes: state

Compares the turmoil in a given state, i.e. the fraction of Radicals

## unit_formation_has_commander
Scopes: new_combat_unit
Targets: character

Checks if ther formation of the scoped combat unit has the provided character as one of its commanders

## used_principle_slots
Scopes: power_bloc

Compare a power bloc's used principle slot count
power_bloc =
{
		used_principle_slots >= 2
}

## variable_list_size
Scopes: none

Checks the size of a variable list
Where X is the name of the variable
Where Y is a script value or number

## war_exhaustion_from_acceptance_of_dead
Scopes: war

Determines the war exhaustion a country gets from their degree of cultural acceptance of manpower killed in the war, regardless of what side they were on

## war_has_active_peace_deal
Scopes: war

True if the war has a proposed peace deal

## war_participant_has_war_goal_of_type_against
Scopes: country

Checks if scope country holds a war goal of a specific type targeting a specific country in any war

## war_side_has_war_goal_of_type_against
Scopes: country

Checks if any country on the same side as scope country in any war holds a war goal of a specific type targeting a specific country

## was_coerced_with_naval_threat
Scopes: treaty

Check if the scoped treaty was accepted through threatening naval hostilities

## was_exiled
Scopes: character

Checks whether the scoped character was exiled

## was_formed_from
Scopes: country

Check if a formed country previously had a specific definition

## wealth
Scopes: pop

Checks if a pop has a certain amount of wealth

## wealth_share
Scopes: country, state

Checks the wealth political strength share of a pop type, religion or culture in a country or state. Exactly one of pop_type, religion or culture must be specified.
	pop_type/religion/culture = <key/scope>
	value <compare operator> <value>
}

## weekly_profit
Scopes: building

Checks whether the profits the building has made this week are above or below a given value

## weighted_calc_true_if
Scopes: none

Returns true if the sum of weights of fulfilled sub-triggers amount to the specified sum

## workforce
Scopes: pop

Compares the workforce size of the scoped pop

## world_market_access
Scopes: state

Checks the world market access of the scoped state
Worldmarket_access > 0.8

## world_market_delta
Scopes: goods

Checks if goods has the specified number of exports minus imports in the world market
Where X = fixed point

## world_market_exports
Scopes: goods

Checks if goods has the specified number of exports in the world market
Where X = fixed point

## world_market_imports
Scopes: goods

Checks if goods has the specified number of imports in the world market
Where X = fixed point

## would_accept_diplomatic_action
Scopes: country

Checks if a country would accept a diplomatic action proposed by another country
if set, modify_acceptance will be added to their acceptance score, to allow for checking if they would accept with an obligation, etc

## would_sponsor_amendment
Scopes: interest_group
Targets: amendment_type

Check if scoped IG would sponsor an amendment of a given type

## year
Scopes: none

Compares the current year of the game

## years_of_service
Scopes: character

Compares the commander's years of service

## years_to_incorporate
Scopes: state

Checks how many years it would take for target country to incorporate scope state
 target = c:FRA
 value > 5
